use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};

fn build_path(base: &str, segment: &str) -> PathBuf {
    let mut path = PathBuf::from(base);
    path.push(segment);
    path
}

fn resolve_absolute(base: &str, abs: &str) -> PathBuf {
    let abs_path = Path::new(abs);
    if abs_path.is_absolute() {
        abs_path.to_path_buf()
    } else {
        let mut path = PathBuf::from(base);
        path.push(abs_path);
        path
    }
}
